Item.Name.E01.2_法医_死亡时间: The time of death was between 0:00 and 2:00 AM
Item.Name.E02_死者_冷库痕迹: The deceased's shoes had cold storage anti-slip powder on the soles
Item.Name.E03_法医_指甲金属: Gray metal paint residue was found under the deceased's fingernails
Item.Name.E03_法医_死者手掌: The deceased had direct contact with a low-temperature object
Item.Name.E04_警察_后门货车: A van was parked at the back gate of the park late at night
Item.Name.E05.1_警察_家庭时间线: Around 23:00, a family of three had a heated argument in the park
Item.Name.E05.2_警察_家庭时间线: Around 00:00, the deceased left alone with Little Three Flowers, but only Little Three Flowers returned
Item.Name.E06_大强_认罪: Siamese claimed the deceased accidentally fell into the lake
Item.Name.E08.1_死者手机_草稿: The deceased's phone contained a draft threatening Orange Cat to divorce and expose his secret
Item.Name.E08.2_死者手机_通话: At 0:31, there was a call record between the deceased and Orange Cat
Item.Name.E09_货车_温度: From 01:28 to 02:54, the van's temperature was maintained at -18 degrees Celsius
Item.Name.E10_货车_抓痕: There were obvious scratches inside the van
Item.Name.E10_货车_车厢: From 01:04 to 03:05, the van appeared twice at the back gate of the park
Item.Name.E11_警察_货车搜查令: You can investigate Orange Cat's van and phone now
Item.Name.E11_遗物_修改受益人: The deceased planned to change the insurance beneficiary to Orange Cat
Item.Name.E11_遗物_受益人: The deceased's 2 million insurance beneficiary was Little Three Flowers
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.3.0: A white refrigerated van with a convenience store logo printed on the body.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.55.0: There are obvious scratch marks on the inner walls of the compartment, with some paint scraped off. The metallic paint color is gray.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.56.0: Vehicle inspection completed, all evidence has been recorded.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.66.0: You find the vehicle's driving recorder. The vehicle started at 23:52 last night, arrived at the back gate of the park at 00:15, reached the back gate of the park again at 03:05, and returned to the convenience store at 03:18.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.67.0: Gray metallic paint... matches the residue found under the victim's fingernails. This is likely where she was trapped.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.69.0: The refrigeration system's temperature log shows that from 00:20 to 02:50, the compartment temperature was maintained at -18 degrees Celsius.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.70.0: -18 degrees Celsius for two and a half hours... enough to freeze someone to death.

第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.75.0: Some of the paint has been scraped off.

第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.78.0: Arrived at the back gate of the park at 01:04.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.79.0: Arrived at the back gate of the park again at 03:05.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.80.0: Returned to the convenience store at 03:15.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.81.0: Between 01:28 and 02:54, the compartment temperature was maintained at -18 degrees Celsius.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.86.0: You notice that a thin layer of anti-slip powder has been spread in the compartment for traction.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.87.0: The anti-slip powder matches the powder on the deceased's feet.
第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.88.0: The deceased had been inside the compartment.

第一天_便利店冷藏车_节点图_调查冷藏车.93.0: It's best not to move around without permission.
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.42.0: Little Calico, what happened last night?
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.43.0: Little Calico, can you tell me about it?
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.67.0: Siamese says it was an accident.
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.70.0: Can you answer my question first, please?
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.79.0: What are you afraid of? Are there other cats?
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.41.0: Then my mom said she wanted to talk to me alone, so she took me aside.
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.44.0: She said after the divorce, she would take me to live with that tomcat.
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.45.0: I don't know... I don't know...
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.72.0: Mom and dad were arguing at night.
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.74.0: I didn't want to. Then we argued again.
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.75.0: Kept running, kept running back, to the back gate.
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.76.0: Until I saw my dad, then we went home.
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.77.0: I was scared, so I ran.
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.80.0: Wah... I want to go home... I want to go home...
第一天_小三花_节点图_交谈.86.0: Let's talk to this child's father, Siamese, first.
第一天_报案人_节点图_与报案人交谈.4.0: I was taking students for a morning run, passed by the lake and saw someone lying on the grass, thought they were drunk, but upon getting closer, found no breathing.
第一天_报案人_节点图_与报案人交谈.8.0: Thought they were drunk, but upon closer inspection, found no breathing.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.14.0: Little Calico and Calico left alone, and only Little Calico returned later. What happened in between?
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.51.0: Calico had an insurance policy, with Little Calico as the beneficiary.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.4.0: Last night, our family of three was discussing the divorce in the park.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.5.0: She said she wanted to talk to Little Calico alone, so they walked away.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.16.0: It might be some comfort for Little Calico.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.17.0: I didn't expect her to buy such insurance.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.18.0: I have nothing more to say. Let us go home early.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.23.0: I'm sorry, it was all an accident...
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.35.0: It's mainly about custody, I disagree.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.36.0: She insists on taking the calico cat away.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.37.0: With that orange cat, I can't accept it.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.40.0: I was worried, so I quietly followed behind.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.42.0: After the calico cat turned back, I chased after her.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.43.0: Later, I heard them arguing loudly, and I was afraid something would happen.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.45.0: She just... just... accidentally fell into the water.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.47.0: I need to check where else there might be clues about this family.
第一天_暹罗_节点图_交谈.57.0: No wonder she kept hiding some documents from me yesterday.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.10.0: How did you come to pick her up?
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.23.0: There's a threatening draft written to you in the calico cat's phone.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.32.0: What's with the scratches and chipped paint in the truck compartment?
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.58.0: I never said it was a text message.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.61.0: The forensic examiner found gray metal paint in the calico cat's fingernails.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.63.0: Where did the frozen goods from last night go?
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.68.0: The calico cat wanted to change the insurance beneficiary to you.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.81.0: What were you doing at the park's back gate twice late at night?
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.83.0: You never went to her house; instead, you returned to the park.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.93.0: The calico cat's shoe soles have anti-slip powder from your truck compartment.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.109.1: What's your relationship with the calico cat?
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.3.0: Hello, is there anything I can help you with?
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.7.0: Last night, I was watching the store as usual.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.8.0: The calico cat told me her family was arguing a lot.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.9.0: Around past midnight, I picked her up and dropped her off at the intersection near her own house.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.11.0: I just drove the truck to pick her up directly.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.21.0: Nothing more to talk about with the convenience store owner for now.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.24.0: I don't care about her text messages; I have nothing to do with their family's mess!
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.25.0: That cat of hers is just crazy, causing trouble for everyone.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.29.0: I need to request an investigation from the police.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.33.0: Scratches? Chipped paint? Must have happened while moving stuff.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.35.0: What does it have to do with my goods?
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.36.0: I'd better check if there are any clues in the truck first.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.52.0: I heard she had an accident; it's such a pity.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.53.0: She was the night shift employee at my store.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.54.0: She asked me to drive to the park's back gate to pick her up.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.55.0: After that, I went back to the store.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.56.0: I happened to load a batch of frozen goods last night.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.64.0: What does it matter? I put it in the warehouse.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.71.0: That's all her wishful thinking; what does it have to do with me!
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.72.0: The orange cat is definitely involved in this.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.73.0: Check what clues the deceased might have left when riding in the orange cat's truck.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.78.0: I... how should I know? She must have scratched it in my car last night.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.79.0: Show me the evidence! Don't move without it.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.82.0: I said, I went to pick up Sanhua and take her home.
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.85.0: I don't want to be involved in this anymore!
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.86.0: Is that enough? Stop asking me!
第一天_橘猫_节点图_交谈.87.0: She... didn't want to go home, so I took her back again.
第一天_橘猫手机_节点图_调查橘猫手机.3.0: Has been lawfully seized by the police.
第一天_橘猫手机_节点图_调查橘猫手机.64.0: Call records show a call from "Hua" at 00:31, lasting 3 minutes and 22 seconds.
第一天_橘猫手机_节点图_调查橘猫手机.66.0: Text message records contain multiple flirtatious conversations with "Hua".
第一天_橘猫手机_节点图_调查橘猫手机.83.0: Without permission, I'd better not move around.
第一天_死者_节点图_观察死者.3.0: A woman lies supine on the lakeside grass, her fingertips pale, with fine frost crystals on her collar and eyelashes, her expression twisted.
第一天_死者_节点图_观察死者.8.0: Her shoe soles are clean, yet there are footprints around... The body was moved here.
第一天_死者_节点图_观察死者.11.0: This white powder is industrial anti-slip powder specifically for cold storage, something impossible to find in a park.
第一天_死者_节点图_观察死者.18.0: On-site clues have been fully recorded.
第一天_死者_节点图_观察死者.23.0: There are scattered footprints around the body, but the victim's shoe soles are surprisingly clean, only coated with a fine layer of white powder.

第一天_死者_节点图_观察死者.31.0: Might have been left by the police or the person who reported it.
第一天_死者_节点图_观察死者.33.0: Ask White Cat if there are similar traces.
